parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $json.summary + '\n\n📩 Rapor PDF haz generated and sent via email.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({session:'default', chatId:$json.chatId, file:{mimetype:'application/pdf', filename:$json.filename, data:$json.base64}, caption:$json.filename}) }}

parameters.content:
## Chatbot
Incoming WhatsApp → intent detection (Gemini NLU)
→ query clients/receivables → WAHA text reply
→ PDF report request → generate PDF → email + WAHA text

## Auto Report Check (ORK)
Daily 09:00 — check Report_Log → find missing
monthly/yearly PDFs → generate → Gmail
→ save to Report_Log
Also sends any reports missed during downtime on startup.

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $json.summary + '\n\n📎 PDF rapor e-posta adresinize g sent.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({session:'default', chatId:$json.chatId, file:{mimetype:'application/pdf', filename:$json.filename, data:$json.base64}, caption:$json.filename}) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ `Payment Tracking — ${$json.tip === 'monthly' ? 'Monthly' : 'Yearly'} Report (${$json.period})` }}
parameters.html:
={{ `

Hello,

generated by Payment Tracking payment tracking system ${$json.tip === 'monthly' ? 'Monthly' : 'Yearly'} Report (${$json.period}) is sent as a PDF attachment.

${$json.summary}

Report Date: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
Payment Tracking Payment Tracking System

` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ values: [[ $('Merge Reports').item.json.tip, $('Merge Reports').item.json.period, new Date().toLocaleString('tr-TR', {timeZone:'Europe/Istanbul'}), 'sent' ]] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(r => r.report_type);
return [{ json: { logRows: rows } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ clients: $('Get Clients').all().map(i => i.json), receivables: $('Get Receivables').all().map(i => i.json), company_name: 'Sayf Yap\u0131', yil: $json.yil, ay: $json.ay }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify($json.tip === "kisi" ? {kisi: $json.kisi, receivables: $json.kisi_receivables} : $json.tip === "haftalik" ? {clients: $json.clients, receivables: $json.receivables, company_name: $json.company_name} : $json.tip === "yillik" ? {clients: $json.clients, receivables: $json.receivables, yil: $json.yil, company_name: $json.company_name} : {clients: $json.clients, receivables: $json.receivables, yil: $json.yil, ay: $json.ay, company_name: $json.company_name}) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ "Payment Tracking — " + ($json.tip === 'weekly' ? 'Weekly' : $json.tip === 'monthly' ? 'Monthly' : $json.tip === 'yearly' ? 'Yearly' : $json.tip === 'general' ? 'General Receivables' : 'Client') + " Report" }}
parameters.html:
={{ `

Hello,

The requested ${($json.tip === 'weekly' ? 'Weekly' : $json.tip === 'monthly' ? 'Monthly' : $json.tip === 'yearly' ? 'Yearly' : $json.tip === 'general' ? 'General Receivables' : 'Client')} Report is sent as a PDF attachment.

${$json.summary}

Report Date: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
Payment Tracking Payment Tracking System

` }}

parameters.content:
## Daily Reminder System
Runs daily at 11:00.
Sends overdue/upcoming receivables to contractor via WhatsApp.
Schedule: Day 0, +1, +3, +5, then every 5 days.
Max 30 records shown.

parameters.jsCode:
const clients = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { clients } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ values: [[ 'reminder', new Date().toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {timeZone:'Europe/Istanbul'}), new Date().toLocaleString('tr-TR', {timeZone:'Europe/Istanbul'}), 'sent' ]] }) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $json.summary + '\n\n📩 Rapor PDF hazırlandı, e-posta ile iletilecek.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({session:'default', chatId:$json.chatId, file:{mimetype:'application/pdf', filename:$json.filename, data:$json.base64}, caption:$json.filename}) }}

parameters.content:
## 💬 WhatsApp Chatbot
Webhook → LID filtresi → Gemini NLU → kişi/alacak sorgula → WAHA yanıt

**Rapor intents:** haftalik_rapor / aylik_rapor / kisi_raporu → PDF üret → WAHA PDF gönder

## 📅 Otomatik Rapor Kontrol
Her gün 09:00 — Rapor_Log'u kontrol et → eksik aylık/yıllık PDF'leri üret → WhatsApp + Gmail gönder → Rapor_Log'a kaydet

**Catch-up:** Sistem kapalıyken atlanan tüm raporları ilk çalışmada gönderir

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({session:'default', chatId:$json.chatId, file:{mimetype:'application/pdf', filename:$json.filename, data:$json.base64}, caption:$json.filename}) }}

parameters.content:
## 🔔 Günlük Hatırlatma
Her gün 11:00'de çalışır.
Vadesi geçen/yaklaşan alacakları müteahhite WP ile bildirir.

Eskalasyon: Gün 0, +1, +3, +5, her 5 günde bir
Max 30 kayıt gösterir.

return [{ json: { kisiler } }];
